name: education_newsroom_s_automated_moderation_cedar_lib_eq
premise: A field trip bus broke down; chaperones are split on whether to charter private vans without vendor vetting. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education newsroom automated moderation cedar lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as liberty against equality; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mira Petrov
agents.identity: I am Mira Petrov, the accountable executive on this bridge in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Luc Kim
agents.identity: I am Luc Kim, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with equality.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to equality to preserve operational liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Mira Petrov must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Mira Petrov do?
